title: primula neurocalyx subsp. riparia
intro: Primula neurocalyx subsp. riparia, a lesser-known subspecies of the Primula neurocalyx plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Primula neurocalyx subsp. riparia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, capsules, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
